programme.desc: Frikke, seorang anak laki-laki berusia 14 tahun, menemukan sebuah permainan komputer jahat yang menggunakan anak-anak sungguhan dari lingkungannya sebagai pemain. Dalam perlombaan melawan waktu, Frikke harus menemukan pencipta jahat dari permainan mengerikan ini.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: Geschichten vom Franz
programme.desc: Franz, sebagai yang terkecil di kelas, sangat terbuka untuk menerima saran. Ketika Franz menemukan seorang influencer, kedua sahabatnya skeptis. Akhirnya, ketiganya menemukan kembali apa yang mereka pikir telah hilang: persahabatan terbesar di dunia.

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Five Children And It
programme.desc: Lima anak yang tinggal di rumah mewah paman mereka yang eksentrik untuk perlindungan selama Perang Dunia I berteman dengan peri pasir yang memiliki kekuatan untuk mengabulkan permintaan.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: Geschichten vom Franz

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Seorang ahli kunci dibebaskan dari penjara dan ditarik kembali ke dunia polisi yang korup dan gangster kota kecil, terlepas dari masa depan yang ia harapkan untuk dibangun bersama mantan tunangannya, seorang detektif, dan putri mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

The End Of The Tour
programme.desc: Kisah wawancara lima hari antara reporter Rolling Stone David Lipsky dan novelis terkenal David Foster Wallace, yang terjadi tepat setelah penerbitan novel epik inovatif Wallace, 'Infinite Jest', pada tahun 1996.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return

programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: Setelah melarikan diri dari Inggris dari pekerjaan yang tidak beres, pembunuh bayaran yang kurang beruntung dipaksa untuk mengasuh putra bos kriminal barunya dan menunjukkan kepadanya bagaimana menjadi seorang pria.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Against The Wild
programme.desc: Dua saudara kandung dan anjing mereka yang setia tersesat di hutan belantara dan harus belajar bagaimana menggabungkan keterampilan mereka, memercayai naluri mereka, dan menavigasi medan yang seindah alam liar.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Christmas In Scotland
programme.desc: Dalam perjalanan ke Skotlandia, seorang desainer instalasi mendapati dirinya membantu sebuah komunitas kecil menciptakan tampilan lampu meriah, meskipun ada campur tangan dari seorang pewaris kaya. Terpaksa bekerja sama, mereka bersatu untuk menghadirkan keajaiban musiman melalui cahaya.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Chirp: Claire and Haley have a bit of quality girl time while they're stuck at home sick. Phil is preoccupied by the taunts of a chirping smoke detector. (S2 Ep7)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny Get Your Gun: Everyone gathers at a restaurant to celebrate Manny's birthday, although Manny himself is experiencing a mini-life crisis about getting older. (S2 Ep8)

programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.desc: In East Sussex, there's rock-solid banoffee pie and obscure meats including pig's trotter and ox cheek, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.desc: Cambridge Hotel: Gordon visits Cambridge, NY, where ex-military man John Imhof runs the Cambridge Hotel like a dictatorship, alienating his staff and guests. (S1 Ep2)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Thunk in the Trunk: With Claire's business up and running, Phil's got a new role doing all the housework. But he feels invisible, ignored and under-appreciated... (S7 Ep13)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Covercraft: Homer forms a band with four other dads, but their modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of lead singer Apu. (S26 Ep8/22)

programme.desc: I Won't Be Home for Christmas: When Moe convinces Homer to stay out late on Christmas Eve, Marge kicks him out of the house and he has to spend Christmas alone. (S26 Ep9/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner: A new amusement park ride transports the Simpsons to Kang and Kodos's home planet, where they're held captive in a zoo. (S26 Ep10/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's New Friend: At the circus, Homer is hypnotised into believing that he's only 10 years old, then gets stuck in his new age and ends up bonding with Bart. (S26 Ep11/22)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Windbreaker City: The team are assigned the role of hostages at a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training exercise. (S2 Ep15)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Wednesday Incident: Peralta teams up with Captain Holt's husband Kevin to find out why Holt's in a bad mood. (S2 Ep16)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Sarge & Pea: Cam is incensed when a rude parent robs him of a precious Lily moment during her dance recital. Jay, Claire and Mitch unexpectedly run into Dede at a family wedding. (S8 Ep11)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Do You Believe in Magic? Worried that his romance with Claire is fizzling out, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentines Day back on track. (S8 Ep12)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Do It Yourself: Phil's feeling pretty good about himself after a successful DIY project. So he convinces Jay to invest in a property that he's always wanted to develop. (S8 Ep13)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Heavy Is the Head: Will Phil have to rethink his property dream? And Cam has to go to hospital but refuses to have an MRI scan because of a traumatic childhood incident in a well. (S8 Ep14)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Girl Code: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app. (S27 Ep10/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.desc: Reece wakes from a surreal nightmare to find Disneyland Darren standing in his bedroom after Jodie lets him stay in the spare room. His return sparks tension with Mr Dunn, now dating Jodie, and Darren’s chaos disrupts the household. At school, it’s Refugee Awareness Week led by the woke Brimble. After derailing events with pranks, Reece is forced by headmaster Meachy to help her, but another prank goes too far and publicly humiliates her, leaving him unexpectedly feeling guilty. Meanwhile, Darren’s jealousy of Dunn spirals into absurd mind games. At Jodie’s 40th birthday party, Darren and Dunn compete for attention with speeches and dance routines. The mood shifts when Jodie takes in two kids after their mum is sectioned, helping Reece realise real care can be helping those closer to home. He later shares this with The Brimble, beginning an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Josie's Taste Of The Westcountry
programme.desc: Proud Bristolian Josie Gibson takes us on a tour of her beloved West Country in a journey of celebration to discover dinner delights, freshly-caught lunches, the best of passionate artisan makers and growers and a few hidden gems to surprise us all - in this episode, Josie gets acquainted with the Cornish sea with a coasteering jump, meets passionate dairy farmers, picks fruit for chef Paul Ainsworth to make a delicious strawberry trifle and catches her own lobster for a scenic BBQ on the beach.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot travels to Letterkenny in Donegal, often called Ireland's 'forgotten county', but quickly discovers a place full of unforgettable people, stories and food. Surrounded by ancient rainforest, he heads into the woods to forage for prized golden chanterelle mushrooms before visiting the renowned Lemon Tree Restaurant, where he learns to make tortellini completely from scratch with one of Donegal's most skilled chefs. Dermot also meets Abdul, a Syrian refugee-turned-honey farmer, who teaches him how to extract honey from the hive and shares traditions from home, including how Syrians enjoy honey with strong coffee and a sweet dish called knaffe. Along the way, Dermot uncovers a county quietly building one of Ireland's most exciting food scenes, shaped by resilience, creativity and a deep connection to the land.

programme.title: Dr. No
programme.desc: Spy thriller film starring Sean Connery and Ursula Andress, 1962. In the first James Bond movie, an MI6 agent is sent to Jamaica to investigate the death of a fellow British agent.Bond follows the sinister trail of Dr. No whose goal is world dominationSean Connery is on scene-stealing form in the film that spawned the rest

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot heads to the wild west of Donegal to explore the county's Irish-speaking Gaeltacht, where the people, music and food are anything but ordinary. After a crash course at Glencolmcille Folk Village - a living museum celebrating old Irish traditions - Dermot bravely puts his Irish to the test ordering a pint in the local pub. He also discovers an old Irish cure-all: carrageen moss pudding, a surprisingly delicious seaweed dessert said to keep everything from colds to heartbreak at bay. Down the road in the fishing town of Killybegs, Dermot gets hands-on with the Molloy family, learning how to fillet monkfish like a pro. He then meets the Shine family, who produce beautifully crafted tinned fish using rare seasonal catches from the Atlantic. Over an unforgettable 'seacuterie' feast, Dermot discovers why Donegal's seafood scene is making serious waves.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.desc: Detective drama based on characters created by crime writer Ann Cleeves. Vera's reunion with Stuart Macken, her first-ever sergeant, occurs under tragic circumstances when his house is petrol bombed - Stuart is badly burned by the attack and his 18-year-old daughter Stella is left fighting for her life in intensive care. Vera is shocked to see that Stuart is a shadow of the man that she knew 20 years before, and she is faced with some long-buried memories of her own when her investigation uncovers unpleasant revelations about his personal life.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When gynaecologist Dr Alec Merrick is accused of sexually assaulting one of his patients during a routine examination, DS Ronnie Brooks, DS Matt Devlin and DI Natalie Chandler are brought in to investigate. But how can they find enough evidence when it's just one person's word against another, and one party is an eminent doctor? Matt and Ronnie bring the case to Crown Prosecutor James Steel and they find themselves grappling with the grey areas of sexual assault charges. But when they begin to feel, along with George Castle, Director of the CPS in London, that they can get no further with this case, Crown Prosecutor Alesha Phillips refuses to accept his orders. As our team splinter, they find themselves up against unstoppable defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone, and with a thin case and a dangerous level of emotional involvement, they must battle it out in court. But who will the jury believe?

programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The villagers organise a group protest against Lord Ashfordly's refusal to allow ramblers across his land. Meanwhile, a convicted armed robber returns to Aidensfield. His reappearance leaves people to presume it is so he can collect the money once stolen from the bank. Greengrass finds a new vocation as a lucky chimney sweep.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is leaving for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin - the Doc goes back to his consultation room, but he is distracted and walks out before going to find Ruth, who tells him that all his problems stem from his childhood because his parents never showed him any love and that he has the propensity to change. As Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang due to a faulty generator that comes as a shock to DJ Caroline - and Al pitches his vision for Ruth's farmhouse to become a bed and breakfast to her - Martin tries to book a flight to Spain to get Louisa back. While on hold, the Doc sorts through his mail and finds a scan of Louisa's brain - when he spots a malformation, he knows that the pressure in an aeroplane could trigger it to bleed and that Louisa has recently taken anticoagulants. If the malformation were to bleed, Louisa would be at risk of suffering a brain haemorrhage...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. The Doc is back in Portwenn but without Louisa, who is taking some time out with her mother in Spain - Martin is left wondering if she will ever come back to him, but he is scheduled to see therapist Dr Rachel Timoney in a bid to give his marriage another chance in the meantime. Meanwhile, Al is fretting about his half-decorated B and B while Steve Baker, the man supposed to be helping, is busy organising a lifeboat exercise - when the time for the exercise comes round, the mock rescue becomes all too real and Martin is out at sea as the time for his first therapy session approaches.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of a missing ten-year-old schoolgirl is found, DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin investigate an emotionally charged child abduction case. But when the case takes a shocking and unexpected twist, Crown Prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips are forced to face some very tough choices in pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Drama series. DS Ronnie Brooks, DS Matt Devlin and DI Natalie Chandler investigate when a homeless man is found beaten nearly to death in the park at the centre of a well-kept square. As they dig deeper, they discover that the man tormented some of the local residents, giving several people a motive for violence. A respectable resident of the square is arrested, but Senior Crown Prosecutor James Steel fears that the jury will sympathise with the alleged attacker and, by acquitting him, encourage vigilantes.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope rescues a young boy from a freezing pond after he escapes from a violent attack which left his mother dead. As Vera and her team investigate what happened to the child, they unravel a web of deadly secrets and discover a murderous sequence of events set in motion by power, money, and a mother's love. Although she is usually awkward and uninterested around children, Vera finds a kindred spirit in the boy and begins to realise that the key to the investigation may lie hidden in his memory.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. The Franco-Spanish frontier, 1813 - a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers and a young nun flees in terror... however, when the soldiers are themselves attacked by the English later on, a French colonel kills his captain.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the South Essex is seriously short of men, and when the Duke of Wellington is told that there are no recruits available, he sends Sharpe to England to investigate. When Sharpe and Harper arrive, they are informed that there are 700 men waiting for them in Chelmsford - however, Sharpe finds the barracks deserted with no sign of his missing regiment. He and Harper decide to assume other identities and enlist - recruited by Sergeant Havercamp, Sharpe and Harper arrive at a training camp near the estate of Sir Henry Simmerson where they are trained mercilessly. Sharpe discovers that the new recruits are being auctioned to other regiments and returns to the Horse Guards with this information to entrust it to an old friend called Lawford... but Lawford wants to avoid a scandal and promptly tells Lord Fenner, who tries to have Sharpe killed. With the help of Fenner's mistress Lady Anne, Sharpe must now find the proof to implicate Fenner.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: StreetDance 2
स्ट्रीटडांस 2
ஸ்ட்ரீட்டான்ஸ் 2
స్ట్రీట్‌డాన్స్ 2
स्ट्रिटडान्स 2
programme.desc: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.
अमेरिकी चालक दल द्वारा अपमानित एक कुशल सड़क नर्तक, ऐश दुनिया के सर्वश्रेष्ठ नर्तकियों की तलाश में बाहर निकलता है। वह फ्रांस में एक नृत्य-प्रतिस्पर्धा में भाग लेने के लिए एक दल को एक साथ लाता है।
ஒரு மோசமான தோல்விக்குபிறகு, இன்வின்சிபல் குழுவுக்கு எதிராக உலகெங்கிலும் உள்ள சிறந்த நடனக் கலைஞர்களை ஒன்றுசேர்க்கும் ஆஷ்.
వీధి నృత్యకారుడు యాష్, ఇన్విన్సిబుల్ సిబ్బందికి వ్యతిరేకంగా ప్రపంచం నలుమూలల నుండి ఉత్తమ నృత్యకారులను ఒకచోట చేర్చుతాడు.
अमेरिकेच्या संघाने ॲशचा अपमान केल्यानंतर ॲश जगभरातील उत्तम नर्तकांचा शोध घेतो.

programme.title: The Kid
द किड
தி கிட்
ద కిడ్
द कीड
programme.desc: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.
एक महिला द्वारा अपने बच्चे को छोड़ दिए जाने के बाद, ट्रम्प उसे ढूँढ़ता है और अपने संरक्षण में ले लेता है। जैसे-जैसे लड़का बड़ा होता है, ट्रम्प और लड़का जीवन की कठिनाइयों से निपटने की कोशिश करते हैं।
கைவிடபட்ட ஒரு குழந்தையை நாடோடி வளர்க்கையில், வாழ்வில் பின்னர் இருவரும் சோதனைகள்-இன்னல்களை சமாளிக்க முயலுக்கிறார்கள்.
ఒక స్త్రీ తన బిడ్డను విడిచిపెట్టిన తర్వాత, ట్రాంప్ అతనిని చూసుకుంటాడు. బాలుడు పెరిగేకొద్దీ వారు పరీక్షలను ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
द हंगर गेम्स: मॉकिंगजे, पार्ट 2
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: மாக்கிங்ஜே, பார்ட் 2
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: మోకింగ్‌జయ్, పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.
कैटनीस एवरडीन को एहसास होता है कि अब वह ज़िंदा रहने के लिए नहीं लड़ रही है। इसलिए, वह अत्याचारी राष्ट्रपति स्नो की हत्या करके पैनम के लोगों को आज़ाद कराने की ठान लेती है।
உயிர்வாழ்வதற்காக போராடவில்லை என்பதை கட்னிஸ், ஜனாதிபதி ஸ்னோவை படுகொலை செய்து பனேம் மக்களை விடுவிக்க முடிவெடுக்கிறார்.
కాట్నిస్ ఎవర్‌డీన్, నిరంకుశ అధ్యక్షుడు స్నోను హత్య చేసి, పనేమ్ ప్రజలను విముక్తి చేయడానికి బయలుదేరుతుంది.

programme.title: Backtrace
बैकट्रेस
பேக்ட்ரேஸ்
బ్యాక్‌ట్రేస్
programme.desc: A thief suffers from amnesia after committing a bank heist and is imprisoned. Seven years later, he is injected with a drug that restores his memory so that he may recover the stolen money.
एक चोर बैंक डकैती करने के बाद भूलने की बीमारी से पीड़ित होता है और उसे जेल हो जाती है। सात साल बाद, उसे एक ऐसी दवा दी जाती है जिससे उसकी याददाश्त वापस आ जाती है ताकि वह चोरी की गई रकम वापस पा सके।
வங்கி கொள்ளைக்கு பின் அம்மீஷியாவால் பாதிக்கப்படும் ஒரு திருடன், பணத்தை மீட்க அவனுக்கு ஞாபகம் வர மருந்தை எடுதுகொள்கிறான்.
బ్యాంకు దోపిడీతో తర్వాత గతం మరచి ఏడేళ్లు జైలుపాలైన ఒక దొంగ, తన గతాన్ని గుర్తు చేసుకోవడానికి ప్రత్యేక మందును ఇవ్వబడతాడు.

programme.title: Modern Times
मॉडर्न टाइम्स
மாடர்ன் டைம்ஸ்
మోడరన్ టైమ్స్
मॉडर्न टाईम्स
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.
अपने व्यवहार के कारण एक फैक्ट्री प्रोडक्शन लाइन से निकाले गए एक वर्कर की मुलाकात, एक अनाथ युवा बेघर लड़की से होती है जिसके साथ वह घर बनाने की कोशिश करता है।
ஒரு தொழிற்சாலை உற்பத்தித் தொழிலாளி அனாதையான ஒரு இளம், வீடற்ற பெண்ணைச் சந்தித்து, அவளுடன் ஒரு வீடு கட்ட முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
ఉద్యోగం నుండి తొలగించబడిన ఒక ఫ్యాక్టరీ కార్మికుడు ఒక నిరాశ్రయురాలైన అమ్మాయితో ఇల్లు కట్టుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Bumblebee
बम्बलबी
பம்பல்பீ
బంబుల్బీ
programme.desc: During the Cybertron Civil War, Optimus Prime sends Autobot scout B-127 to Earth to form a base where they can regroup. Later, the scout befriends a girl named Charlie, who names him Bumblebee.
साइबरट्रॉन गृहयुद्ध के दौरान, ऑप्टिमस प्राइम ऑटोबोट स्काउट बी-127 को पृथ्वी पर बेस बनाने के लिए भेजता है। बाद में, स्काउट, चार्ली से दोस्ती करता है, जो उसे बम्बलबी नाम देती है।
சைபர்டிரான் உள்நாட்டு போரிபோது, ​​ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைம், பூமிக்கும் அனுப்பும் ஸ்கவுட் பி-127, பெண் சார்லியுடன் நட்பாகிறது.
అంతర్యుద్ధం సమయంలో, ఆప్టిమస్ పంపిన ఆటోబోట్ బి-127, చార్లీతో స్నేహం చేస్తాడు, ఆమె అతనికి బంబుల్బీ అని పేరు పెడుతుంది.

programme.title: A Quiet Place Part II
ए क्वाइट प्लेस पार्ट 2
எ குயட் பிளேஸ் பார்ட் II
ఏ క్వయిట్ ప్లేస్ పార్ట్ II
ए क्वायट प्लेस पार्ट II
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, Regan and her family learn that the alien predators can be defeated using high-frequency audio. Soon, armed with this knowledge, they set out to look for other survivors.
तबाही के बाद की दुनिया में रेगन और उसके परिवार को पता चलता है, कि हाई-फ़्रीक्वेंसी ऑडियो से एलियन शिकारियों को हरा सकते हैं। जल्द ही, इस ज्ञान के साथ, वे अन्य बचे हुए लोगों को खोजने निकल पड़ते हैं।
உயர் அதிர்வெண் ஒலியால் வேற்றுக்கிரகவாசிகளை தோற்கடிக்கலாம் என அறிந்த ரீகன் குடும்பம், மற்றவர்களைத் தேடிப் புறப்படுகிறது.
ప్రళయానంతరం, అధిక-ఫ్రీక్వెన్సీ ఆడియోను ఉపయోగించి గ్రహాంతర వేటగాళ్లను ఓడించవచ్చని రీగన్, ఆమె కుటుంబం తెలుసుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Transformers
ट्रांसफॉर्मर
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மார்ஸ்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स
programme.desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.
सैम विटविकी एक कार खरीद अनजाने में, ऑटोबोट्स और डिसेप्टिकॉन्स के बीच जीवन सृजन करने वाले उपकरण को लेकर होने वाले संघर्ष में फंस जाता है।
சாம் விட்விக்கி ஒரு காரை வாங்கும்போது, ​​ஆட்டோபாட்களுக்கும் டிசெப்டிகான்களுக்கும் இடையிலான போரில் சிக்கிக் கொள்கிறார்.
సామ్ విట్విక్కీ ఒక కారు కొన్నప్పుడు, అతను తెలియకుండానే ఆటోబాట్స్, డిసెప్టికాన్స్ మధ్య యుద్ధంలో చిక్కుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
रश आर 2
ரஷ் ஹவர் 2
రష్ అవర్ 2
रश आवर 2
programme.desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.
हांगकांग में अमेरिकी दूतावास में बम विस्फोट के बाद जासूस जेम्स कार्टर और मुख्य निरीक्षक ली कार्रवाई पर लौटते हैं।
ஹாங்காங்கில் உள்ள அமெரிக்க தூதரகத்தில் வெடிகுண்டு வெடித்த பிறகு மீண்டும் நடவடிக்கைக்கு திரும்பும் கார்ட்டர் மற்றும் லீ.
డిటెక్టివ్ కార్టర్, ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్ లీ హాంకాంగ్‌లోని అమెరికా రాయబార కార్యాలయంలో జరిగిన బాంబు పేలుడును దర్యాప్తు చేస్తారు.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
जी.आई. जो: रिटैलीएशन
ஜி.ஐ. ஜோ: ரிடாலியேஷன்
జి.ఐ. జో: రిటాలియేషన్
जी.आय. जो: रिटॅलिएशन
programme.desc: The GI Joes are declared traitors by Zartan, with Cobra Commander now having all the world leaders under his control. With nowhere to go, the team turns to its original leader, General Colton.
ज़ार्टन के जीआई जोस को देशद्रोही घोषित करने के बाद, दुनिया का लीडर कोबरा कमांडर बन जाता है। कोई रास्ता न होने पर टीम अपने पुराने लीडर जनरल कोल्टन के पास वापस जाती है।
ஜர்த்தனால் துரோகிகள் என்று அறிவிக்கப்பட்ட ஜோஸ், எங்கு செல்வது என்று அறியாமல் ஜெனரல் கோல்டனிடம் செல்கின்றனர்.
జీఐ జోస్ ను జార్టన్ దేశద్రోహులుగా ప్రకటించినప్పుడు కోబ్రా కమాండర్ ఇప్పుడు ప్రపంచ నాయకులందరినీ తన నియంత్రణలో ఉంచుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
द ममी रीटर्न्स
தி மம்மி ரிட்டர்ன்ஸ்
ది మమ్మీ రిటర్న్స్
द ममी रिटर्न्स
programme.desc: An Egyptologist is caught in the crossfire when a sinister cult resurrects the mummified body of an evil priest. The group then aims to use his ancient power to defeat a legendary warrior.
एक दुष्ट उस कंगन को हथियाना चाहता है जो पुरातत्वविद् दंपति के बेटे के पास है।
தொல்பொருள் ஆய்வாளரின் மகனான அலெக்ஸிடமுள்ள கைக்காப்பை விரும்பும் தீயதலைமை பூசாரி.
ఒక దుష్ట పూజారి పొందాలనుకున్న అలెక్స్ ఒక పురాతత్వవేత్త కొడుకుకు దొరుకుతుంది.
एका दुष्ट पंथाने, एका दुष्ट पुजाऱ्याच्या ममी केलेल्या शरीराला पुनरुज्जीवित केल्यावर एक इजिप्तशास्त्रज्ञ अडचणीत सापडतो.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
पिरान्हा 3डी
பிரானா 3டி‌டி
పిరాన్హా 3డిడి
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.
खून के प्यासे पिरान्हा एक स्थानीय वाटर पार्क की ओर बढ़ते हैं। पार्क में मौज-मस्ती की तलाश में जुटी भीड़ के बीच दोस्त मैडी, बैरी और काइल, आदमखोर जीवों से लड़ने का फैसला करते हैं।
ஒரு நீர் பூங்கா நோக்கி செல்லும் தீய பிரன்ஹாக்களை தடுக்க முயலும் அங்கு வேடிக்கை-தேடும் மேடி, பாரி மற்றும் கைல்.
ముగ్గురు స్నేహితులు మ్యాడీ, బారీ, కైల్‌లు స్థానిక వాటర్ పార్క్ వైపు వస్తున్న రక్తపిపాసి పిరాన్హాలను చంపాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
एस्केप प्लैन 2: हेड्स
எஸ்கேப் ப்ளான் 2: ஹேட்ஸ்
ఎస్కేప్ ప్లాన్ 2: హేడిస్
एस्केप प्लॅन 2: हेड्स
programme.desc: Security expert Ray Breslin forms a team of skilled personnel after escaping 'The Tomb'. However, when one of his colleagues goes missing, Breslin is forced to revisit the group that imprisoned him.
सुरक्षा विशेषज्ञ रे ब्रेस्लिन, 'द टॉम्ब' से भागने के बाद कुशल कर्मियों की टीम बनाता है। हालाँकि, उनका एक साथी लापता हो जाता है, तब ब्रेस्लिन को उस समूह से फिर से मिलना पड़ता है जिसने उसे कैद किया था।
பாதுகாப்பு நிபுணர் ரே பிரெஸ்லின்,சக ஊழியர் காணாமல் போனதால், கடந்த காலத்தை மீண்டும் நினைக்க வேண்டிய கட்டாயம் ஏற்படுகிறது.
సమాధి నుండి బయటపడ్డ బ్రెస్లిన్ నిపుణులైన భద్రతా సిబ్బందిని ఏర్పాటు చేసుకుంటాడు. కానీ అందులో ఒకరు కనిపించకుండా పోతారు.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
टॉम एण्ड जेरी
டாம் அண்ட் ஜெர்ரி
టామ్ అండ్ జెర్రీ
टॉम अ‍ॅन्ड जेरी
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.
एक शरारती चूहा जैरी, एक आलीशान होटल में शरण लेता है जहाँ एक शादी होने वाली है। उससे छुटकारा पाने के लिए, इवेंट प्लानर में से एक जैरी के बिल्ली के समान प्रतिद्वंद्वी टॉम को काम पर रखता है।
திருமணம் நடக்கவுள்ள ஆடம்பர ஹோட்டலில் தங்கும் குறும்புக்கார ஜெர்ரியை விரட்ட அதன் எதிரியான டாமை அழைக்கும் பணியாளர்.
వివాహం జరగనున్న ఒక హోటల్ లో చేరిన జెర్రీని వదిలించుకోడానికి ఈవెంట్ ప్లానర్‌లలో ఒకరు దాని ప్రత్యర్థి టామ్‌ని నియమిస్తాడు.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
द हंगर गेम्स
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్
programme.desc: Katniss volunteers to replace her sister in a tournament that ends only when one participant remains. Pitted against contestants who have trained for this all their life, she has little to rely on.

कैटनीस अपनी बहन की जगह एक ऐसे टूर्नामेंट में भाग लेने के लिए स्वेच्छा से आगे आती है जो तभी समाप्त होता है जब एक प्रतिभागी बचता है। प्रतियोगियों के सामने जिन्होंने जीवन भर इसी के लिए प्रशिक्षण लिया है।
ஒரு பங்கேற்பாளர் மட்டுமே உள்ள நிலையில் முடிவடையும் போட்டியில் சகோதரிக்கு பதிலாக நுழையும் காட்னிஸை சகோதரியோ நம்பவில்லை.
తన సోదరికి బదులుగా ఒక టోర్నమెంట్‌లోకి ప్రవేశించిన కాట్నిస్, జీవితాంతం దీని కోసం శిక్షణ పొందిన పోటీదారులతో పోరాడాలి.

programme.title: Johnny English
जॉनी इंग्लिश
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.
जॉनी इंग्लिश, एक अनाड़ी ब्रिटिश एजेंट, एक इंटरपोल एजेंट के साथ मिलकर एक फ्रांसीसी अरबपति का पता लगाने का प्रयास करता है, जिसने ताज के गहने चुरा लिए हैं।
ஜானி இங்கிலீஷ், இன்டர்போல் முகவருடன் இணைந்து, கிரீட நகைகளைத் திருடிய பிரெஞ்சு கோடீஸ்வரரைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
బ్రిటిష్ ఏజెంట్ జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ ఏజెంట్‌తో కలిసి కిరీట ఆభరణాలు దొంగిలించిన ఫ్రెంచ్ బిలియనీర్‌ని కనిపెడతాడు.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
जी.आई. जो: द राइज़ ऑफ कोबरा
ஜி.ஐ. ஜோ: தி ரைஸ் ஆஃப் கோப்ரா
జి.ఐ. జో: ది రైజ్ ఆఫ్ కోబ్రా
जी.आय. जो: द राईज ऑफ कोब्रा
programme.desc: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.
अमेरिकी सैनिक ड्यूक और रिपकॉर्ड हथियार डीलर जेम्स मैककुलन के हमले से बच जाते हैं और जल्द ही उसे हमेशा के लिए खत्म करने के लिए एक विशिष्ट सैन्य दल में शामिल हो जाते हैं।
அமெரிக்க வீரர்கள் டியூக்-ரிப்கார்ட் ஆயுத வியாபாரி ஜேம்ஸ் மெக்கல்லனின் தாக்குதலிலிருந்து தப்பி,இராணுவ குழுவில் இணைந்தனர்.
జేమ్స్ మెక్‌కల్లెన్ చేసిన దాడి నుండి బయటపడిన అమెరికన్ సైనికులు డ్యూక్, రిప్‌కార్డ్ లు ఒక ఉన్నత సైనిక బృందంలో చేరతారు.
अमेरिकन सैनिक ड्यूक आणि रिपकॉर्ड, शस्त्र विक्रेता जेम्स मॅककलनच्या हल्ल्यातून बचावतात आणि एका लष्करी संघात सामील होतात.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
स्पाइडर-मैन 3
ஸ்பைடர்-மேன் 3
స్పైడర్‌-మ్యాన్ 3
स्पाईडर-मॅन 3
programme.desc: A symbiote bonds with Peter Parker, intensifying his abilities and aggression. Now, he must face the challenges that his new powers bring while simultaneously fighting new villains.
पीटर पार्कर के साथ एक सिंबियोट जुड़ता है, जिससे उसकी क्षमताएं और आक्रामकता बढ़ जाती है। अब, उसे अपनी नई शक्तियों के साथ-साथ आगे आने वाली चुनौतियों का सामना करना होगा।
பீட்டர் பார்க்கர் என்கிற ஸ்பைடர் மேனின் மூன்றாவது வலை சாகசம்.
గ్రహాంతరవాసితోకలిసిన స్పైడర్-మ్యాన్ పీటర్ పార్కర్, సాండ్‌మ్యాన్ను ఎదుర్కొంటూ, మేరీతో విచ్చిన్నమైనబంధాన్ని కొనసాగించాలి.

programme.title: Man of Tai Chi
programme.desc: This is Film - Action Category

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
काँग: स्कल आइलैंड
காங்: ஸ்கல் ஐலேண்ட்
కాంగ్: స్కల్ ఐలాండ్
programme.desc: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.
स्कल आईलैंड का नक्शा बनाने के लिए वहां पहुंचने वाले एक दल पर विशालकाय बंदर ने हमला कर दिया। बचे हुए लोग बंदर, द्वीप के मूल निवासियों और भूमिगत राक्षसों के बारे में अधिक जानने के लिए इकट्ठा होते हैं।
ஸ்கல் தீவுக்கு சென்ற குழுவினர்கள் மனிதகுரங்கால் தாக்கப்பட்டபின் அவர்களில் சிலர் மீண்டுமிணைந்து அப்பகுதியை ஆராய்கின்றனர்.
స్కల్ ద్వీపాన్ని చేరుకున్నవారిపై ఒక పెద్దకోతి దాడిచేస్తుంది,మిగిలినవారు కోతి గురించి,ద్వీపం మూలాల గురించి తెలుసుకుంటారు.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Barry Seal is a US pilot who smuggles drugs for the CIA in the 1980s. Later, his secret work gets revealed as part of the Iran-Contra scandal.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
दी अमेज़िंग स्पाइडर-मैन 2
த அமேசிங் ஸ்பைடர்-மேன் 2
ది అమేజింగ్ స్పైడర్-మాన్ 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.
अपने शहर और प्रिय व्यक्तियों की रक्षा करते हुए, पीटर पार्कर नए दुश्मनों का सामना करता है और अपने बचपन के दोस्त हैरी ऑसबोर्न से फिर से मिलता है।
புதிய எதிரிகளுடன் மோதி தனது பால்ய நண்பருடன் மீண்டும் இணையும் பீட்டர் பார்க்கர்.
పీటర్ పార్కర్, చావుబ్రతుకుల మధ్య తననితాను కాపాడుకోడానికి స్పైడర్ మ్యాన్ రక్తం కోసం చూస్తున్న తన పాతమిత్రుడిని కలుస్తాడు.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
टॉप गन: मेवरिक
டாப் கன்: மேவ்ரிக்
టాప్ గన్: మావెరిక్
टॉप गन: मॅव्हरिक
programme.desc: After 30 years of service, Maverick mentors a troop of elite Top Gun alumni for an esteemed mission while battling his demons from the past.
30 वर्षों की सेवा के बाद, मेवरिक अपने अतीत के संघर्षों से जूझते हुए एक प्रतिष्ठित मिशन के लिए टॉप गन के पूर्व छात्रों की एक विशिष्ट टुकड़ी का मार्गदर्शन करते हैं।
மேவரி கடந்த கால பேய்களுடன் போராடும் அதே வேளையில், டாப் கன் முன்னாள் மாணவர் குழுவை மதிப்புமிக்க பணிக்காக வழிநடத்துகிறார்.
30 సంవత్సరాల సేవ తర్వాత, మావెరిక్ ఉన్నత స్థాయి మిషన్ కు సిద్ధం కావడానికి ఎలైట్ టాప్‌గన్ గ్రాడ్యుయేట్లకు శిక్షణ ఇస్తుంది.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
नाउ यू सी मी 2
நவ் யு சீ மீ 2
నౌ యూ సీ మీ 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.
एक कुटिल तकनीकी जादूगर चार घुड़सवारों के नाम से जाने जाने वाले जादूगरों को एक शक्तिशाली चिप चुराने के लिए मजबूर करता है जो दुनिया के सभी कंप्यूटरों को नियंत्रित कर सकती है।
உலகின் அனைத்து கணினிகளையும் கட்டுப்படுத்தக்கூடிய சிப்பைத் திருட ஒரு சூனியக்காரரால் வற்புறுத்தப்படும் குதிரை வீரர்கள்.
దుర్మార్గుడైన టెక్ నిపుణుడు ప్రపంచంలో కంప్యూటర్లన్నింటిని నియత్రించగల చిప్‌ను దొంగిలించమని ఫోర్ హార్స్‌మెన్ ను పంపుతాడు.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: Cardiff. Retail manager Yuno serves up some traditional dancing alongside his Nepalese food. But are his spicy dishes too fiery for his guests' delicate palates? (Ep3/5) [S]

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
